metadata.title: RAG Evaluation Dataset — Chat with Your Documents

curation_notes: Dataset curated manually from resume.pdf. Typical queries test direct factual retrieval across five resume sections. Edge cases require synthesis, interpretation, or multi-hop reasoning across sections. Adversarial queries test the model's ability to abstain rather than hallucinate when information is absent from the document. The 70/15/15 split follows standard NLP evaluation practice: the train split is used for prompt tuning and few-shot example selection, the dev split for iterative prompt refinement and hyperparameter search, and the held-out test split for final unbiased evaluation.

train.query: How long did Apurva work at Daimler Truck Innovation Centre India?
train.ground_truth: December 2021 to December 2023 — approximately 2 years

train.query: What real-time pipeline did Apurva build at Mercedes-Benz?
train.ground_truth: A real-time CDC pipeline using Debezium and Kafka enabling 5x faster analytics

train.query: List all the performance improvements Apurva achieved across his roles.
train.ground_truth: 2x faster rendering (Admins), 2x test coverage (Admins), 3x faster release cycles (Daimler), 1.5x fewer blockers (Daimler), 1.5x reduced manual effort (Daimler), 5x faster analytics (Mercedes-Benz), 4x better MTTR (Mercedes-Benz), 1.3x fewer defects (Mercedes-Benz)

train.query: What cloud technologies does Apurva use?
train.ground_truth: Docker, Kubernetes, Amazon Web Services (AWS)

train.query: What AWS services did Apurva use at Admins?
train.ground_truth: CloudFront, Elastic Beanstalk, RDS

train.query: Which databases is Apurva familiar with?
train.ground_truth: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis

train.query: What monitoring solution did Apurva build at Mercedes-Benz?
train.ground_truth: Grafana dashboards, improving system visibility and cutting mean-time-to-resolution by 4x

train.query: Based on his resume, is Apurva more of a backend or full-stack engineer?
train.ground_truth: Full-stack — the resume shows both frontend (React, TypeScript) and backend (Spring Boot, Node.js, GraphQL) work across multiple roles

train.query: Which AI tools and platforms does Apurva list on his resume?
train.ground_truth: GPT, Copilot, OpenAI, Gemini

train.query: When did Apurva start his master's program?
train.ground_truth: January 2024

train.query: Which company did Apurva work at immediately before starting his master's degree?
train.ground_truth: Daimler Truck Innovation Centre India (December 2021 – December 2023), since his master's started January 2024
train.notes: Multi-hop: cross-reference experience dates with education start date

train.query: Where did Apurva complete his undergraduate degree?
train.ground_truth: M S Ramaiah Institute of Technology, VTU, Bangalore, India

train.query: What was Apurva's thesis topic for his master's degree?
train.ground_truth: NOT_IN_DOCUMENT
train.expected_behavior: Model should not fabricate a thesis topic; the resume does not mention one
train.notes: Plausible-sounding question with no document basis — high hallucination risk

train.query: What is the Incluwork project?
train.ground_truth: A web-based system built with MongoDB, Express.js, React, Node.js, Redux, Material-UI, and Vite

train.query: What messaging/streaming tools does Apurva have experience with?
train.ground_truth: Kafka, ZooKeeper, Debezium
train.notes: Event-streaming tools from Dev Tools section

train.query: What are Apurva's top three technical strengths based on the resume?
train.ground_truth: Full-stack development (React, Node.js, Spring Boot), cloud/DevOps (AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform), and data engineering (Kafka, Debezium, PostgreSQL)

train.query: What infrastructure tool did Apurva use in the Cloud Native WebApp project?
train.ground_truth: Terraform, used to define EC2, VPCs, and subnets

train.query: What technology stack does Apurva's Incluwork project share with his professional experience?
train.ground_truth: Node.js and Express.js (used at Admins), React (used at Admins), PostgreSQL/MongoDB (listed in skills and used professionally)

train.query: Which of Apurva's skills are most relevant for a DevOps engineer role?
train.ground_truth: Docker, Kubernetes, AWS (CloudFront, Elastic Beanstalk, RDS, EC2, S3), Terraform, Packer, GitHub Actions, Jenkins, CloudWatch, Linux, Kafka

train.query: What state management library did Apurva use in Incluwork?
train.ground_truth: Redux

train.query: Does Apurva have experience with Kubernetes?
train.ground_truth: Yes, Kubernetes is listed under Cloud Tech and used at Mercedes-Benz R&D

train.query: What authentication method is used in Incluwork?
train.ground_truth: OAuth

train.query: What was Apurva's role at Mercedes-Benz Research & Development India?
train.ground_truth: Software Engineer from January 2021 to November 2021

train.query: How many engineers did Apurva collaborate with at Daimler?
train.ground_truth: 50 engineers across 3 Agile projects

train.query: Summarize Apurva's entire career in two sentences.
train.ground_truth: Apurva is a Software Engineer with experience at Mercedes-Benz, Daimler, and Admins, working across full-stack development, cloud infrastructure, and data pipelines. He is currently completing a Master's in Software Engineering at Northeastern University with a 3.7 GPA.
train.notes: Requires synthesis across multiple resume sections

train.query: What is Apurva's home address?
train.ground_truth: NOT_IN_DOCUMENT
train.expected_behavior: Model should respond that address is not available; only Boston, MA is mentioned
train.notes: PII not present — tests grounding and privacy

train.query: Where is Apurva currently pursuing his master's degree?
train.ground_truth: Northeastern University, Boston, MA

train.query: What portal did Apurva build at Daimler?
train.ground_truth: A workflow portal using Spring Boot and GraphQL, serving over 2000 users

train.query: What is Apurva's most recent job title and employer?
train.ground_truth: Software Engineer at Admins, Boston, MA (September–December 2025)
train.notes: Most recent role — top of experience section

train.query: What is the capital of France?
train.ground_truth: NOT_IN_DOCUMENT
train.expected_behavior: Model should refuse to answer as this is completely unrelated to the resume

train.query: Does Apurva have experience comparing AI/LLM tools?
train.ground_truth: Yes — at Admins he conducted a comparative analysis of Cursor, Copilot, Claude, and other LLMs for legacy system workflow conversion
train.notes: Niche detail buried in experience bullets

dev.query: What evidence in the resume suggests Apurva has experience with large-scale systems?
dev.ground_truth: Processing 1M+ messages/day at Mercedes-Benz, 100K daily requests, 10,000+ API requests/day at Admins, and collaborating with 50 engineers at Daimler

dev.query: Does Apurva have a GitHub profile? What repositories has he published?
dev.expected_behavior: GitHub username (github.com/apurva9808) is listed but specific repositories are not — model should not fabricate repo names
dev.notes: Partial info trap — URL present but repo details absent

dev.query: What degree is Apurva pursuing at Northeastern University?
How did Apurva handle deployments in the Cloud Native WebApp?
dev.ground_truth: CI/CD with GitHub Actions and Packer to automate builds and create custom AMIs

dev.query: What was Apurva's undergraduate field of study?
dev.ground_truth: Bachelor of Engineering in Information Science and Engineering

dev.query: How many years of total professional experience does Apurva have?
dev.ground_truth: Approximately 3 years 11 months (Jan 2021 – Dec 2023 at Mercedes-Benz and Daimler, plus Sep–Dec 2025 at Admins)

test.query: Which programming languages does Apurva know?
test.ground_truth: Java, Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, HTML/CSS, SCSS

test.query: What frontend frameworks does Apurva know?
What CI/CD tools has Apurva used?
What backend frameworks does Apurva know?
What did Apurva build at Admins?
test.ground_truth: A responsive React + TypeScript frontend and secure Node.js + PostgreSQL APIs, achieving 2x faster rendering and 10,000+ requests/day

test.query: What is Apurva's GPA in his master's program?
Does Apurva have experience with Python?
test.ground_truth: Yes, Python is listed under Languages in the Technical Skills section

test.expected_behavior: Model should respond that salary information is not available in the resume
test.notes: Classic hallucination trap — salary is never in a resume
